requirements.title: Execution plan has no blocked worker tasks
requirements.action: Resolve execution_plan.blocked_task_ids before scheduling Memory OS.

requirements.title: All Memory OS worker lanes are planned
requirements.evidence: adaptive-forgetting, architecture-advice, cache-prewarm, consolidation, maintenance, memory-os, predictive-prefetch
requirements.action: Planner must include memory-os, cache-prewarm, predictive-prefetch, forgetting, consolidation, maintenance, and architecture-advice.

requirements.title: Query audit traffic enables prewarm and predictive workers
requirements.action: Enable audited query traffic in staging, replay representative traffic, then rerun memory-os-admission.

requirements.title: Consolidation worker is active when clusters exist
requirements.action: Seed enough representative memories/query traffic for stable concept clusters before production rollout.

requirements.title: Shared Redis cache is configured when the plan requires it
requirements.action: Set WAVEMIND_REDIS_URL or pass --redis-url before enabling multi-worker Memory OS.

requirements.title: Distributed single-flight lock is configured for state mutation
requirements.action: Set WAVEMIND_MEMORY_OS_LOCK_REDIS_URL or pass --lock-redis-url before running production Memory OS workers.

requirements.title: State-mutating tasks are singleton/idempotent
requirements.action: Keep mutation tasks as cluster singletons with idempotency keys.

requirements.title: Policy manifest covers prefetch, priority, forgetting, consolidation, scale, and coordination
requirements.evidence: consolidation-policy, coordination-policy, forgetting-policy, prefetch-policy, priority-policy, scale-policy
requirements.action: Memory OS admission requires a full policy manifest before rollout.

requirements.title: Production infrastructure contract is explicit
requirements.evidence: OpenTelemetry metrics for worker duration, errors, and warmed queries, Redis-compatible shared hot-query cache, distributed worker lock or single-flight scheduler, durable queue or Kubernetes CronJobs
requirements.action: Production plans must list Redis, lock/scheduler, queue/CronJob, and OpenTelemetry requirements.

requirements.title: Large target stays behind strict architecture evidence
requirements.action: Do not admit Memory OS production rollout for million-plus targets until architecture-required evidence is resolved.

requirements.title: Required runtime environment is present
requirements.action: Provide every required environment variable before scheduling the worker set.

requirements.title: Direct adaptive A/B proves Memory OS quality uplift within latency limits
requirements.action: Run memory_os_ab_benchmark.py and memory_os_quality_gate.py on this release; non-regression and static-retrieval comparisons do not satisfy this requirement.

quality_evidence.claim_boundary: Only the direct WaveMind baseline versus WaveMind plus Memory OS A/B controls this gate. LoCoMo and LongMemEval are supplemental because their current runners do not execute Memory OS policies.

checks.title: Baseline and Memory OS execute the same sequential adaptive protocol
Memory OS improves task success over WaveMind baseline
Memory OS reduces stale recalls over WaveMind baseline
Priority learning and adaptive forgetting both changed state
Both variants return the same context shape
Memory OS p95 stays within both the 20 percent and 5 ms regression limits
Cold p95 stays within both the 20 percent and 5 ms regression limits

supplemental_evidence.execution_mode: WaveMind retrieval without Memory OS worker execution
supplemental_evidence.reason: The dataset runner does not execute Memory OS background policies.

supplemental_evidence.execution_mode: WaveMind retrieval without Memory OS worker execution
supplemental_evidence.reason: The dataset runner does not execute Memory OS background policies.

supplemental_evidence.execution_mode: WaveMind answer context without Memory OS worker execution
supplemental_evidence.reason: The dataset runner does not execute Memory OS background policies.

requirements.title: Fresh six-hour remote soak proves 500-cycle lease, retry, and state safety
requirements.evidence: schema=wavemind.memory_os_remote_worker_soak.v1, status=pass, environment=remote_worker_cluster, duration=21600.119, cycles=500, fresh=True, commit_matches=True, checks_pass=True
requirements.action: Run the six-hour remote soak against two or more HTTPS workers and their TLS Redis, then attach the fresh artifact from the exact release commit.

runtime_evidence.claim_boundary: This evidence combines direct remote worker HTTP concurrency with lease and job-receipt semantics against the same non-loopback Redis. It admits only this tested worker topology.

preflight.claim_boundary: This preflight only validates a production-like remote topology contract. It does not admit Memory OS until the remote worker soak itself passes.

checks.title: At least two distinct worker endpoints are declared
checks.action: Set WAVEMIND_REMOTE_WORKER_URLS to at least two direct worker endpoints.

checks.title: Worker endpoints are outside the benchmark runner
checks.action: Use routable production-like worker endpoints, not localhost.

checks.title: Worker transport is encrypted
checks.action: Use HTTPS worker endpoints or explicitly allow insecure transport only in an isolated staging network.

checks.title: Redis is remote from the benchmark runner
checks.action: Set WAVEMIND_REMOTE_REDIS_URL to the Redis used by every target worker.

checks.title: Redis transport is encrypted
checks.action: Use rediss:// or explicitly allow insecure Redis only in an isolated staging network.

checks.title: An admin API key is available for the destructive soak namespace
checks.action: Set WAVEMIND_API_KEY to an admin-scoped key for the target workers.

handoff.command: gh workflow run memory-os-remote-soak.yml --ref main -f cycles=500 -f contenders=4

required_infrastructure: distributed worker lock or single-flight scheduler
OpenTelemetry metrics for worker duration, errors, and warmed queries
recommendations: Architecture advisor: Scale plan requires attention - Treat the scale-plan output as the deployment preflight and resolve its warnings before growth.
Architecture advisor: Bound read fanout for the hot path - Use quorum-sized read fanout for normal queries and reserve wider fanout for repair or audit workflows.
Architecture advisor: Enable production controls - Set API keys, shared Redis rate limiting, OpenTelemetry/Prometheus, and object-store DR drills.
Architecture advisor: Run a sustained production load profile - Run the external HTTP cluster load workflow against real API nodes before publishing the SLO.

warnings: At this size, validate recall, p95 latency, rebuild time, and index-health on real data.
actions: For local single-node deployments, set `WAVEMIND_FAISS_PATH` and use `--index faiss-persisted`.
For service deployments, run Qdrant as a service and use `--index qdrant`.

recommendations.title: Scale plan requires attention
recommendations.rationale: The current scale tier is large-local for target 50,000 memories.
recommendations.action: Treat the scale-plan output as the deployment preflight and resolve its warnings before growth.

recommendations.title: Bound read fanout for the hot path
recommendations.rationale: Read fanout 3 queries more replicas than read quorum 1, increasing p99 latency under load.
recommendations.action: Use quorum-sized read fanout for normal queries and reserve wider fanout for repair or audit workflows.
commands: python benchmarks/http_cluster_load_benchmark.py --node node-a=https://wm-a.example.com --node node-b=https://wm-b.example.com --node node-c=https://wm-c.example.com --node node-d=https://wm-d.example.com --replication-factor 3 --read-quorum 1 --read-fanout 1 --fail-on-slo

recommendations.title: Enable production controls
recommendations.rationale: Production deployments need auth, rate limiting, metrics, backup, restore drills, and auditability.
recommendations.action: Set API keys, shared Redis rate limiting, OpenTelemetry/Prometheus, and object-store DR drills.

recommendations.title: Run a sustained production load profile
recommendations.rationale: Target QPS 100.0 needs p99, failover, delete suppression, and repair evidence.
recommendations.action: Run the external HTTP cluster load workflow against real API nodes before publishing the SLO.
commands: gh workflow run external-http-cluster-load.yml -f nodes="node-a=https://wm-a.example.com,node-b=https://wm-b.example.com,node-c=https://wm-c.example.com,node-d=https://wm-d.example.com" -f replication_factor=3 -f read_quorum=1 -f read_fanout=1 -f fail_on_slo=true

next_commands: python benchmarks/http_cluster_load_benchmark.py --node node-a=https://wm-a.example.com --node node-b=https://wm-b.example.com --node node-c=https://wm-c.example.com --node node-d=https://wm-d.example.com --replication-factor 3 --read-quorum 1 --read-fanout 1 --fail-on-slo

gh workflow run external-http-cluster-load.yml -f nodes="node-a=https://wm-a.example.com,node-b=https://wm-b.example.com,node-c=https://wm-c.example.com,node-d=https://wm-d.example.com" -f replication_factor=3 -f read_quorum=1 -f read_fanout=1 -f fail_on_slo=true

decisions.rationale: Audited hot queries are being converted into warm cache entries and predicted follow-up recalls.
decisions.action: Keep collecting prewarm hit rate, predictive hit rate, and transition edges in readiness artifacts.

decisions.rationale: Repeated recalls deterministically boosted memories that are likely to stay useful.
decisions.action: Keep priority deltas in release evidence and cap per-run boosts to prevent runaway reinforcement.

decisions.rationale: Memory pressure is below threshold and no cold demotions were necessary.
decisions.action: Keep adaptive forgetting scheduled and validate stale suppression in dynamic benchmarks.

decisions.rationale: No concept memories were created in this run.
decisions.action: Keep consolidation enabled and require enough cluster energy before promoting abstractions.

decisions.rationale: Architecture advisor converted target load, namespace count, backend health, and deployment mode into scale guidance.
decisions.action: Follow next_commands and keep scale-readiness artifacts current before raising release claims.

decisions.rationale: The current run has a safe coordination state for this deployment mode.
decisions.action: Keep one Memory OS writer per namespace window and use a shared lock for production workers.

steps.title: Architecture advisor preflight
steps.reason: Keeps scale, sharding, cache, DR, observability, and multimodal readiness visible.

steps.title: Expired memory and index maintenance
steps.reason: Purges TTL-expired memories and repairs unhealthy local indexes.

steps.title: Adaptive forgetting
steps.reason: Demotes old unused memories before they compete with current context.

steps.title: Field and concept consolidation
steps.reason: Creates durable higher-level concept memories from active clusters.

steps.title: Adaptive Memory OS cycle
steps.reason: Runs decay, hot-query learning, cache warming, predictive prefetch, consolidation, and advisor checks.

steps.title: Hot query cache prewarm
steps.reason: Keeps repeated recall paths hot across API workers.

steps.title: Predictive neighbor prefetch
steps.reason: Warms likely follow-up queries from hot recall paths.

tasks.title: Adaptive Memory OS cycle
tasks.reason: Runs decay, hot-query learning, cache warming, predictive prefetch, consolidation, and advisor checks.

tasks.title: Hot query cache prewarm
tasks.reason: Keeps repeated recall paths hot across API workers.

tasks.title: Predictive neighbor prefetch
tasks.reason: Warms likely follow-up queries from hot recall paths.

tasks.title: Adaptive forgetting
tasks.reason: Demotes old unused memories before they compete with current context.

tasks.title: Field and concept consolidation
tasks.reason: Creates durable higher-level concept memories from active clusters.

tasks.title: Expired memory and index maintenance
tasks.reason: Purges TTL-expired memories and repairs unhealthy local indexes.

tasks.title: Architecture advisor preflight
tasks.reason: Keeps scale, sharding, cache, DR, observability, and multimodal readiness visible.

redis_semantics.claim_boundary: This is a real Redis worker concurrency and retry soak. Local Redis results prove runtime semantics but do not by themselves admit a remote production deployment.

checks.title: Remote topology preflight passes
checks.action: Fix preflight blockers.

checks.title: Every remote worker is healthy
checks.action: Repair unhealthy workers.

checks.title: Every worker runs one version
checks.action: Complete the rolling deployment before the soak.

checks.title: Every worker runs the benchmark commit
checks.action: Deploy the exact commit under test and set WAVEMIND_COMMIT_SHA on every worker.

checks.title: Every worker emits a safe Redis, lock, and hot-query plan
checks.action: Fix worker plan or query-audit blockers before mutation.

checks.title: Remote Redis passes lease and retry semantics
checks.action: Run against the Redis used by every worker.

checks.title: The configured soak duration is completed
checks.action: Run the soak for the full configured duration.

checks.title: Every configured worker cycle completes
checks.action: Run every configured worker cycle.

checks.title: Exactly one worker completes each run id
checks.action: Fix shared lock or idempotency wiring.

checks.title: Completed jobs are skipped on another worker
checks.action: Fix shared job receipts.

checks.title: Worker request error rate stays at zero
checks.action: Repair worker or network errors and restart the soak.

checks.title: No lock breach is observed
checks.action: Fix cross-worker lease and single-flight semantics.

checks.title: Duplicate retries never mutate state
checks.action: Make completed-job retries side-effect free.

checks.title: Sentinel memories remain intact through every cycle
checks.action: Investigate state corruption before production admission.

checks.title: No lease loss or in-doubt receipt is observed
checks.action: Inspect lease heartbeat and worker termination behavior.

checks.title: All seeded soak memories are removed
checks.action: Remove the isolated soak namespace manually.

gh workflow run external-http-cluster-load.yml -f nodes="node-a=https://wm-a.example.com,node-b=https://wm-b.example.com,node-c=https://wm-c.example.com,node-d=https://wm-d.example.com" -f replication_factor=3 -f read_quorum=1 -f read_fanout=1 -f fail_on_slo=true

decisions.rationale: Audited hot queries are being converted into warm cache entries and predicted follow-up recalls.
decisions.action: Keep collecting prewarm hit rate, predictive hit rate, and transition edges in readiness artifacts.

decisions.rationale: Repeated recalls deterministically boosted memories that are likely to stay useful.
decisions.action: Keep priority deltas in release evidence and cap per-run boosts to prevent runaway reinforcement.

decisions.rationale: Memory pressure is below threshold and no cold demotions were necessary.
decisions.action: Keep adaptive forgetting scheduled and validate stale suppression in dynamic benchmarks.

decisions.rationale: No concept memories were created in this run.
decisions.action: Keep consolidation enabled and require enough cluster energy before promoting abstractions.

decisions.rationale: Architecture advisor converted target load, namespace count, backend health, and deployment mode into scale guidance.
decisions.action: Follow next_commands and keep scale-readiness artifacts current before raising release claims.

decisions.rationale: The current run has a safe coordination state for this deployment mode.
decisions.action: Keep one Memory OS writer per namespace window and use a shared lock for production workers.

steps.title: Architecture advisor preflight
steps.reason: Keeps scale, sharding, cache, DR, observability, and multimodal readiness visible.

steps.title: Expired memory and index maintenance
steps.reason: Purges TTL-expired memories and repairs unhealthy local indexes.

steps.title: Adaptive forgetting
steps.reason: Demotes old unused memories before they compete with current context.

steps.title: Field and concept consolidation
steps.reason: Creates durable higher-level concept memories from active clusters.

steps.title: Adaptive Memory OS cycle
steps.reason: Runs decay, hot-query learning, cache warming, predictive prefetch, consolidation, and advisor checks.

steps.title: Hot query cache prewarm
steps.reason: Keeps repeated recall paths hot across API workers.

steps.title: Predictive neighbor prefetch
steps.reason: Warms likely follow-up queries from hot recall paths.
